heading: Authority
label: 13611 Authority
text: Notwithstanding any other provision of law, an owner of a covered section 8 housing project (as such term is defined in ) designed primarily for occupancy by elderly families may, in selecting tenants for units in the project that become available for occupancy, give preference to elderly families who have applied for occupancy in the housing, subject to the requirements of this subchapter.section 13619 of this title
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this subtitle”, meaning subtitle D of title VI of , , , which enacted this subchapter and amended .Pub. L. 102–550106 Stat. 3823section 1437f of this titleOct. 28, 1992
